nasb.text: Then the people of Israel were divided into two parts: half of the people followed Tibni the son of Ginath, to make him king; the other half followed Omri.

esv.text: Then the people of Israel were divided into two parts. Half of the people followed Tibni the son of Ginath, to make him king, and half followed Omri.

cnv.text: 那時，以色列人分成兩半：一半跟從基納的兒子提比尼，要立他作王；一半跟從暗利。

ccb.text: 那时，以色列人分为两派，一派拥立基纳的儿子提比尼做王，另一派支持暗利。
